prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 14 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 87.4 kg; Height 165.3 cm; BMI 32.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/71 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.8%; 9 months ago 8.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 199mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 187mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 90.7kg; 9 months ago 89.2kg; 6 months ago 83.7kg; 3 months ago 85.2kg; current 87.4kg), Height (12 months ago 165.3cm; 9 months ago 165.3cm; 6 months ago 165.3cm; 3 months ago 165.3cm; current 165.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 138mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 139mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 71mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 47U/L; 3 months ago 34U/L; current 47U/L), AST (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 34U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.0mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 10mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.6mL/min/1.73m²; current 7mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 646mg/g; 9 months ago 897mg/g; 6 months ago 649mg/g; 3 months ago 667mg/g; current 743mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 89mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 90mg/dL; 3 months ago 91mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 45mg/dL; 3 months ago 45mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 122mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.4g/dL; 9 months ago 12.3g/dL; 6 months ago 11.6g/dL; 3 months ago 11.6g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
